title: cotula duckittiae
intro: Cotula duckittiae, also known as Cotula, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in South African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cotula duckittiae include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the preparation and dosage.
